markdown:
#  Delete Drawings 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * When you delete a drawing from your project, you cannot restore it from the Deleted Drawings area to your drawings log. Deleted drawings can be accessed and downloaded, then uploaded again if a drawing is accidentally deleted and needs to be added back to a drawing set. This way of handling deleted drawings protects your current set of drawings from being inadvertently overwritten by an older, previously deleted revision.


##  Steps 
  * Delete an Individual Drawing
  * Delete Multiple Drawings (including all drawings from the current set)


### Delete an Individual Drawing
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Mark the checkboxes next to the drawing you want to delete.
  3. Click delete ![Icon Delete Trash6](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dbb3da647413c8d26d99a2503cae34a/e42448ea8213372016febd013f8b7532/trash-icon.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to delete drawing
  4. Confirm the deletion.


### Delete Multiple Drawings
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Mark the checkboxes next to the drawings or discipline(s) you want to delete, or mark the topmost checkbox to select all the drawings in the set.
  3. Click the Delete icon to delete the revisions of the drawings you have selected. 
#####  Important
Clicking **Delete** removes revisions within your currently viewed set. Before deleting, check the 'Revision' and 'Set' columns to see which set you are viewing. Deleting in the current set removes the latest drawing revision, making the next most recent revision the new 'current' drawing. Deleting a revision in an older set simply removes it from the 'Revisions' section when [viewing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-drawings) a drawing.
  4. Click **Continue** to confirm.


## See Also
  * [Review and Confirm Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/review-and-confirm-drawings)
  * [Delete Pending or Unpublished Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-pending-or-unpublished-drawings)
  * [Delete a Drawing Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-a-drawing-area)
title: Delete Drawings
description: How to delete a drawing from the Drawings tool.
